docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED DEC-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DAVID
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, DAVID $3,394.76 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,519.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DAVID
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-18-2013 (SERVICE FEE $75.00) AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DAVID
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DAVID HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,394.76 FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PER PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT HAS PAID HIM THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT BY CASHIERS CHECK; PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FORM IN THE CLERK'S OFFICE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
